commands.summary: Regenerated audits/reports/dashboard.md so Repopact reflects CLV-018 as satisfied with the new decision/evidence records.
Repopact doctor reported the repository healthy after CLV-018 records were updated.
Repository governance validation passed with the CLV-018 work item and evidence metadata current.
Local system audit passed: required files, work item manifests, stale README checks, and markdown link/date checks are valid.
Production dependency audit completed with 0 high-or-higher vulnerabilities.

environment.process_note: 015 CLV-018 (channel roadmap records). Decision 0009 records future adapter boundaries for email, push, Telegram, WhatsApp Business, Discord, RSS/Atom, first-party mobile companion, local webhook/LAN integrations, and direct telecom separation. The record documents intended use, privacy/security notes, likely credentials, inbound/outbound capability, quick-action support boundaries, failure modes, and why Matrix is excluded from work item 015.
